MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE, N.A.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE CCP 664.6 DISMISSAL, AND ENTER JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT.

Due to the court's unavailability on December 22, 2025, this case is called on December 23, 2025.
